name: Multi-Factor Authentication Interception - MFA Token Theft
description: Detects MFA interception via smart card API hooking, real-time phishing proxies (EvilGinx2, Modlishka, Muraena), and SS7 interception tools for OTP capture.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("*SCardTransmit*", "*SCardConnect*", "*winscard*") or process.args : ("*evilginx*", "*modlishka*", "*muraena*") or process.args : ("*ss7*", "*SigPloit*"))
